title: LIC Form 300 - Corrected & Reconciled Schema (All 28 Pages)
description: Reconciled schema incorporating all gaps found between original schema and filled form data

latest_photo.description: Passport size photograph of the Life to be Assured

agent_intermediary_details.title: To be filled by Agent / Intermediary

correspondence_address.description: Current Address if different from permanent address

armed_forces_employment.description: To be answered if employed in the Armed Forces

existing_insurance.description: List of existing insurance policies — empty array if none

appointee_details.description: Required if nominee is a minor

signature_of_life_to_be_assured.description: ADDED: Signature of the life to be assured — present in filled form, was missing from original schema

page_7.title: ProposalAndRiderDetails
page_7.description: CORRECTED: Original schema for pg7 was misaligned — it covered police/SSS fields. This page actually contains the core proposal details including riders and plan.

insurance_objective.description: ADDED: Objective of insurance e.g. Risk Cover, Savings etc.

police_duty_applicable.description: Whether police duty rider is applicable

page_9.title: SettlementOptionsAndPortalRegistration
page_9.description: CORRECTED: Original schema treated this as a health page. Actual page 9 contains settlement options and portal registration.

settlement_option_maturity.description: ADDED: Whether proposer wishes to avail settlement option for maturity benefit

settlement_option_death_instalment.description: ADDED: Whether proposer wishes to avail death benefit in instalments

lic_portal_registered.description: ADDED: Whether proposer is registered on LIC portal

additional_ailment_checklist.description: ADDED: Second set of ailment checkboxes continuing from page 10

female_proponents_details.description: Applicable for Female Proponents only — use NA for males

husband_details.description: Applicable for Female Proponents only — use NA for males

applicant_name.description: ADDED: Name of the applicant signing the declaration

declaration_agreed.description: Confirmation of agreement to the declaration statements

applicant_name.description: ADDED: Name of the applicant as printed below signature

scribe_declaration.description: Declaration by person filling form (if different language or due to disability)

note.const: No data entry fields on this page
No data entry fields — Insurance Act 1938 provisions only

enum: Option C: Single Premium Level Income Benefit
Option D: Single Premium enhanced cover with Level Income Benefit

payout_mode.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from single string to checkbox object

sum_assured_on_death_option.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from single string enum to checkbox object

smoker_status.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from single string to checkbox object

benefit_option.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from single string to checkbox object

smoker_status.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from single string to checkbox object

sum_assured_on_death_option.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from single string to checkbox object — note both may be ticked, requires human review

proof_of_income_verified.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from flat array to structured object with per-document verification status

age_basis.description: ADDED: Age basis e.g. NBD (Next Birthday)

marital_status.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from single string enum to checkbox object

occupation.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from single string enum to checkbox object

nature_of_documents.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from array of strings to checkbox object

object_of_insurance.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from array of strings to checkbox object

risk_profile.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from single string to checkbox object

payment_method.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from single string to checkbox object

time_frame.description: CORRECTED: Expanded from single string to checkbox object

categorization_of_plans.description: CORRECTED: Original schema had only a flat 'selected_plan' string. Actual form has a full categorization table with plans listed under each objective/risk-profile combination.

point_10_suitability_check.description: ADDED: Point 10 — Is total insurance added to the present proposal reasonable in relation to income? Was entirely missing from original schema.

is_total_insurance_reasonable_in_relatio.description: Agent's assessment of whether total insurance is justified relative to proposer income

statement.description: ADDED: Declaration statement text agreed to by agent
ADDED: Declaration statement text agreed to by prospect
